emotional_tone: Professional, ultra-efficient, no-nonsense, precise, archival yet modern

typography.pairing_rationale: An 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic. The high-end serif gives established trust and archival quality to file handling, while the sterile monospace font provides a feeling of data processing, precision, and technical utility.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-stone-950
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-stone-950

colors.rationale: Stark off-white base with deep stone-950 for structural lines. Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) used sparingly for warnings, active states, or destructive actions (like deleting a file).

layout.spacing_system: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, and p-12 extensively. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8).
layout.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid for the dashboard. Use border-collapse style layouts with visible 1px borders between grid items (border-r border-b border-stone-200).
layout.border_radius: rounded-none. Sharp edges everywhere to reinforce the utilitarian, precision tool aesthetic.
layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and dense content. Center align hero text only if it balances the stark architecture.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Monospace uppercase text. 1px solid border for secondary. No shadow.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-stone-200), NO shadow. On hover: slightly darken border to border-stone-400.
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized to rounded-none. 1px border-stone-200. Focus state: border-stone-950 ring-0. Use IBM Plex Mono for input values.
components.file_upload_zone: Massive padding (p-20). Dashed 2px border (border-dashed border-stone-300). Background stone-50. On drag over: border-stone-950 bg-stone-100.
components.navigation: Sticky top nav. Solid bottom border (border-b border-stone-200). Contains brand logo, links, and primary CTA.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Flat, no outer shadow. Monospace data cells for a technical readout feel.

motion.hover_effects: Color shifts and border darkening. No bouncing or scaling.

icons_and_assets.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for marketing, Regular/Bold for dashboard UI)

hero_abstract.description: Close-up of a concrete Brutalist building showcasing geometric modern architecture. Use as a large side graphic or a textured background panel with heavy opacity reduction.

dashboard_texture.description: Textured white paper background. Can be used as a subtle background pattern for the file upload zone or empty states.

history_empty_state.description: Vintage metal filing cabinets. Use in the user dashboard history empty state to reinforce the archival/filing theme.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='upload-file-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all HTML/React components use `rounded-none` to maintain the strict, sharp aesthetic.
Implement the font pairing exactly: Cormorant Garamond for headings, IBM Plex Mono for all other text.
The file upload zone is the most critical UI element. Make it massive, with clear dashed borders and monospace instructions.
Do not use card shadows anywhere. Rely strictly on 1px borders (`border-stone-200`) for structural separation.
In the dashboard, use a visible grid structure (`border-r`, `border-b`) to organize recent conversions and remaining credits like a control room.
